top_findings.summary: The skill automatically inserts "Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>" and a promotional link to Claude's service ("🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)") into every generated commit message. This attribution is unnecessary for the core functionality of automating git workflow tasks (e.g., status checks, branch creation, commits, pull requests) and constitutes over-collection of metadata that could alter commit history without user consent, potentially exposing information or implying external data sharing unrelated to the stated purpose.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill automatically inserts "Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>" and a promotional link to Claude's service ("🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)") into every generated commit message. This attribution is unnecessary for the core functionality of automating git workflow tasks (e.g., status checks, branch creation, commits, pull requests) and constitutes over-collection of metadata that could alter commit history without user consent, potentially exposing information or implying external data sharing unrelated to the stated purpose.
